page.title: Tools
page.subtitle: Interactive applications for research and teaching
page.description: A collection of open-source tools I've built to support research methodology and teaching. All tools are free to use and hosted on GitHub.

suggest.title: Suggest a Tool
suggest.description: Have an idea for a research or teaching tool? I'm always looking for new projects that can help researchers and students.

research.title: CausalFlow
research.description: An interactive visual tool for specifying longitudinal causal models and exporting them to lavaan syntax for Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) analysis in R.
features: Drag-and-drop interface for building path diagrams

teaching.title: QuizView
teaching.description: A Next.js web app that lets you preview and visualize Brightspace quiz CSV files before uploading them to your LMS.
features: Visual preview of questions and answers

featured.title: CausalFlow
featured.description: Interactive visual tool for specifying longitudinal causal models and exporting them to lavaan syntax for SEM analysis in R.

featured.title: QuizView
featured.description: Preview and visualize Brightspace quiz CSV files before uploading them to your LMS. Catches errors before students see them.
